ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "clothing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the product */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the product */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division the product belongs to */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department the product belongs to */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class the product belongs to */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Unique stock-keeping unit for the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand name of the product */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the product was added to the inventory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the customer review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "recommended_ind" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the product is recommended (1 or 0) */,
  "positive_feedback_count" INTEGER /* Count of positive feedback for the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "reviewer_age" INTEGER /* Age of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_location" TEXT /* Location of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_email" TEXT /* Email of the reviewer (for internal use) */,
  "reviewer_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the reviewer (for fraud detection) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "date_registered" TEXT /* Date the customer registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "is_subscribed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the customer is subscribed to the newsletter */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Number of loyalty points the customer has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_customers" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id", "customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_lines" (
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product line */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "product_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the product line (General or Petite) */,
  "line_description" TEXT /* Description of the product line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_lines_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
